_comment: Update this file as the tournament progresses. phase: pre | group | knockout | done. currentRound: group | r32 | af | kf | hf | finale

groupScores._comment: Key = match index (0-71). Values are integers.

groupStandings._comment: Fill in after group phase completes. Order: 1st to 4th.

ko._comment: Key = match id (r32_0 … r32_15, af_0 … af_7, kf_0 … kf_3, hf_0, hf_1, tf, fin). h/a = actual teams, sh/sa = actual scores (integers).
